description_long: This kiosk features a raised platform with a rectangular footprint, supported by sturdy wooden posts and accessed via a central staircase. The main structure is surrounded by a waist-high railing made of wood and transparent panels, providing both safety and visibility. The platform surface appears to be made of a smooth, light-colored material, possibly composite or laminate, with a subtle matte finish. The kiosk's perimeter is adorned with a repeating logo or signage, adding a commercial touch. The staircase is centrally aligned and constructed from the same wood as the railings, leading up to the open platform. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility and visibility.
description: A modern, elevated kiosk with a central staircase, wood railings, and transparent panels, featuring perimeter signage and a smooth platform surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase directly facing the viewer, with the platform and railings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the staircase and the depth of the platform, with the railing and signage visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the staircase centered, offering a clear look at the platform's back railings and the open entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staircase from a different angle, emphasizing the platform's width and railing details.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign with repeating logo, placed along the perimeter of the platform's side panels
attribute_window_presence: two rectangular transparent panels on the front and rear railings
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at the top of the central staircase
attribute_roof_design: none; open platform with no overhead covering
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with functional and clean lines
